# sedai_account (Data Source)

Look up an existing Sedai account by name. Returns the account's ID plus cloud-provider metadata. Use this to reference accounts created outside Terraform.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The exact name of the account to look up. Errors at plan time if no account with this name exists.

### Read-Only

- `cloud_provider` (String) The cloud provider of the account (`AWS`, `AZURE`, `GCP`, `KUBERNETES`).
- `id` (String) The Sedai account ID.
- `integration_type` (String) The integration type (`AGENTLESS`, `AGENT_BASED`).
